growth_news.title: AI Helps Doctors Spot Brain Tumors Faster
growth_news.description: Scientists have built a wonderful AI tool called Hetairos that studies medical images to quickly find and label brain tumor subtypes. This life-saving technology helps doctors act fast and create custom treatment plans for patients.

growth_news.title: Google Gemini Brings AI Magic to the World Cup
growth_news.description: The world's biggest soccer event is teaming up with Google Gemini! This friendly AI assistant is helping organizers analyze matches in real-time, create cool graphics, and make the games even more exciting for sports fans worldwide.

growth_news.title: Order Dinner by Snapping a Photo with AI
growth_news.description: DoorDash is launching exciting updates that let you order food or book reservations simply by taking photos or using chat prompts. This helpful upgrade makes ordering food as easy as texting a picture of your favorite pizza to a friend.

tech_news.title: Learn to Build Your Own Planning AI Agent
tech_news.description: A new tutorial shows how kids and coders can build a custom AI agent from scratch. This project is like teaching a virtual robot how to plan its day, deciding all the steps to tidy up its room before it actually starts moving any toys.

tech_news.title: The Quest to Build an 'Artificial General Engineer'
tech_news.description: Tech builders want to create a highly skilled 'General Engineer' AI that can help design complex systems. Imagine having an expert LEGO master inside your computer who knows how to design and build anything you can dream up.

tech_news.title: AI Joins the Race to Win Le Mans
tech_news.description: Top racing teams are using AI to make split-second decisions during the famous 24-hour Le Mans endurance race. It works like a super-smart video game coach that calculates the absolute perfect moment to change tires, helping the driver stay safe and fast.

jargons.definition: A computer program that learns to find patterns by mimicking how cells in the human brain talk to each other.
jargons.example: Like a big team of friends holding hands, passing clues along until they finally guess the right secret word.
jargons.use_case: Helping computers recognize if a photo shows a cute cat or a playful dog.

jargons.definition: A clever technique that lets an AI look at all parts of a sentence at once to decide which words are the most important.
jargons.example: When you hear 'The giant robot ate the tree because it was hungry,' attention helps you connect 'it' to the hungry 'robot' rather than the 'tree.'
jargons.use_case: Powering translators so that foreign languages sound natural and make perfect sense.

jargons.definition: A process where an AI searches through trustworthy articles or books to find accurate facts before giving you an answer.
jargons.example: It's like an open-book quiz where you get to double-check the school textbook before writing down your final answer.
jargons.use_case: Helping school chatbots answer history questions with 100% correct facts.

jargons.definition: Training an AI by letting it try different actions and rewarding it with virtual points whenever it gets closer to a goal.
jargons.example: Teaching your puppy to roll over by giving them a delicious biscuit every time they follow your hand motion.
jargons.use_case: Training computer programs to play and beat complex video games entirely on their own.

jargons.definition: Taking an AI that is already smart and giving it extra practice in one specific subject to make it an expert.
jargons.example: A student who is already great at general science taking a special week-long camp to learn all about dinosaur bones.
jargons.use_case: Teaching a general-purpose writing bot how to sound exactly like a medical doctor or a fun storyteller.

tools.name: Cursor
tools.trending_factor: This smart code editor helps creators build games and apps instantly by predicting what they want to code next.

tools.name: NotebookLM
tools.trending_factor: You can upload notes, and it instantly generates fun study guides, quizzes, and even realistic podcast discussions.

tools.name: v0
tools.trending_factor: Let's you design and code functional website screens in seconds just by typing what you want in simple English.

tools.name: Midjourney
tools.trending_factor: Generates magical, museum-quality artwork and fantastical scenes from your most creative descriptions.

tools.name: ElevenLabs
tools.trending_factor: Allows young creators to generate cool voices and sound effects for their animation projects and school presentations.
